evals.prompt: /wiki — set up a wiki for this repository (mode B).
evals.expected_output: Scaffolds wiki/ structure (index, hot, log, concept/entity/source dirs) per mode B; no overwrite of existing content.

evals.prompt: /wiki — continue where we left off (vault already scaffolded, hot.md present).
evals.expected_output: Reads hot.md silently, reports recent context and suggests next action instead of re-scaffolding.
